Your body seems tired today 💜

Keep going and maintain good hydration 💧

conseil_sommeil_faible: 😴 Your sleep is low, try to rest more.

coach_invite_etat: Log in to personalize your tracking.
coach_invite_conseil: Start by filling in your health profile, then track your hydration and physical activity.
coach_invite_hydratation: Recommended goal: about 2 L per day.
coach_invite_sport: Recommended light activity: 20 to 30 minutes of walking.
coach_invite_alerte: No alert available without a connected profile.
coach_hydratation_faible: Your hydration is low today. Try drinking a glass now and continue gradually.
coach_hydratation_proche: You are close to your goal. Keep drinking regularly.
coach_hydratation_atteint: Hydration goal reached. Keep this rhythm.
coach_sport_debut: Start with a simple activity: walking, stretching, or breathing for 10 minutes.
coach_sport_progression: Good progress. You still have a few minutes left to reach your sport goal.
coach_sport_atteint: Sport goal reached. Remember to recover and stretch.
coach_alerte_sommeil: Low sleep: avoid intense exercise and choose a light activity.
coach_alerte_stress: Your mood indicates stress. Take a 5-minute breathing break.
coach_conseil_recuperation: Your priority today is recovery: stay well hydrated and avoid intense efforts.
coach_conseil_hydratation: ORA recommends improving your hydration before thinking about a sport session.
coach_conseil_marche: A short walk can improve your energy without pressure.
coach_conseil_excellent: Excellent rhythm. Keep your balance between hydration, sleep, and activity.
coach_conseil_general: Move forward gently: a glass of water, light movement, and a good night can improve your day.
meteo_conseil_orage: Warning: storm risk. Avoid going out unless necessary and leave extra time.
meteo_conseil_pluie: It may rain. Take an umbrella and leave earlier.
meteo_conseil_brouillard: Low visibility. Be careful on the road and leave earlier.
meteo_conseil_vent: It is windy. Be careful during your trip.
meteo_conseil_chaud: It is hot. Drink water and avoid prolonged effort.
meteo_conseil_froid: It is cold. Dress warmly before going out.
meteo_erreur_connexion: I could not retrieve real weather data. Check your internet connection.
